{{Expand}}

{{Infobox artifact
| name = The Scythe of the Reaper
| introduced = Uncrowned
}}

== Uncrowned ==
{{spoiler|book=cradle-07-uncrowned|The true Scythe of the [[Reaper]] has the power to erase a world without waste or corrupted residue.<ref name="cradle-07-uncrowned-c2">''Uncrowned'', chapter 2</ref>}}

== Notes ==
<references />

{{Cradle nav}}

[[Category:Artifacts]]
[[Category:Uncrowned]]
[[Category:Cradle]]
[[Category:Cradle artifacts]]
